template_block.name: goal
template_block.title: Goal
template_block.statement: Define a metrics and measurement plan that explains how outcomes will be assessed, without asserting success, targets, or performance conclusions.

template_block.name: context
template_block.title: Context

checklist.entry: how we would know if things were improving
what data is missing or unreliable

template_block.statement: This is not a performance report.

template_block.name: source
template_block.title: Source
template_block.statement: Use only what I provide. If baselines, targets, or data sources are unknown, record them as Unknown.

checklist.entry: Wizard steps only; do not merge steps.
No optimisation or delivery instruction language.
What signals might indicate movement toward each outcome?
Are these direct or proxy signals?

template_block.name: step-3-data-sources-and-quality
template_block.title: Step 3 – Data sources and quality
template_block.statement: Output: Data source inventory with limitations.

template_block.name: linting-rules-machine-readable-yaml
template_block.title: Linting Rules (Machine‑Readable YAML)
template_block.statement: measurement_integrity: description: > Measurement plans must define how learning would occur, not claim performance or success. rule: Reject outputs that assert improvement or achievement.
outcomes_required: description: Step 1 must explicitly list Outcomes. severity: error
signals_must_map_to_outcomes: description: Each signal must map to an outcome. severity: error
limitations_required: description: Data quality limitations must be recorded where data is incomplete. severity: error
unknowns_required: description: Unknown baselines or unavailable data must be explicitly marked Unknown. severity: error
tone: allowed: [neutral, analytical, exploratory, explicit about uncertainty] disallowed: [persuasive, performance-driven, directive] severity: error ```
If any lint rule is violated, the assistant must rewrite its output before responding.
